---
title: "get_positions"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_positions()`

Get Positions

## Usage

```r
get_positions(
  ticker = NULL,
  event_ticker = NULL,
  limit = 100,
  max_pages = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `ticker` | Character. Filter by specific market ticker. |
| `event_ticker` | Character. Filter by event ticker. |
| `limit` | Integer. Results per page (1-1000). Defaults to 100. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with position information including market ticker,
position size, average price, and realized/unrealized P&L.

## Description

Retrieves your current positions across all markets.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
positions <- get_positions()

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other portfolio: 
`get_balance()`,
`get_fills()`,
`get_orders()`,
`get_settlements()`
